---
artifact_id: FIX-U01
pair_id: FIX-U01
lang: en
pair_revision: 1
glossary_terms: [TERM-UNKNOWN]
technical_contract:
  outcomes: [CO-FIXTURE-1]
  equations: ["V = I R"]
  values: {R1: "1 kΩ"}
  safety_limits: {voltage_max: "12 V"}
  expected_ranges: {current: "9-11 mA"}
  rubric_total: 10
  answer_key_digest: sha256:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
  figure_ids: [FIG-FIX-1]
rubric:
  total: 10
  rows:
    - {id: reasoning, points: 4}
    - {id: evidence, points: 5}
---

# Seeded QA failure

This uses the avoided phrase potential force. RESTRICTED-SOLUTION: 42.

![](missing.svg)

[Broken link](missing.md) and [unregistered source](https://example.invalid/source).
